raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "ridsan zaur jaweem Elka-Dee-
weem darrijs grehkoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ta fakka tas
KUNGS Israëta Deeus: Redf
es weddichu taunn pahr Je-
rusalemî un pahr Juhdu / ka ik-
katram/ kas to ḏsird abbi diwi
Ausis skaunchs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es wilkschu pahr Je-
rusalemî Samartjas Mehra-
Ankli/ un Akaba Naïna Sivar-
ru/ un iṣkrattischu Jerusalemî /
fà Btohdu iṣkratta/ kas iṣkratti-
ta tohp / un us Mutti apgahsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es atstahschu tohs At-
likkutthus mannas Gemantofcha-
nas/ un nodohschu tohs winnu
Eenaidneeku Rohkâ/ un tee buhs
par Lanpijumu un Jspohstischa-
nu wiſſeem winnu Eenaidnee-
keem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tee darrijschi/
kas man ne patihk/ un mann ap-
kattinaifschi / no tahs Deenas/
kad winnu Tehwi no Egiptes is
gahje/ lihds chodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl istehje Manassus
arridsan nenoseedsigu Affini toh-
ti dauds/ teekains Jerusalemî ne
weena Galla lihds ehtram villa
tappe: Bes teem Grehkeem/ ar
fo wiſsch Juhdu grehkoht darri-
ja/ darroht/ kas tam KUNGam
ne patikke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Manassus
Leetahm atleek un wiſſs/ fo wiſſch
irr darrijs/ un winna Grehki/ fo
wiſſch irr grehkojis/ tas wiſſ irr
rakstihts to Kehnizu no Juhda
Laiku-Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Manassus afëmigge
ar jaweem Tehweem/ un tappe
tawa Namina Dahrsâ/ Usajus
Dahrsâ aprakts / un wienna
Dehls Amons tappe par Kehni-
nu wienna Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Amons bija divideſmits
un diwi Gaddus wezz / kad tas
par Kehnizu tappe / un waḍija
diwi Gaddus Jerusaleme / un
winna Mahteî bija Mesulemete
Wahrda / Aruza Meita no
Jotbas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch darrija / kas
tam KUNGAM ne patikke/ it-
tin ka winna Tehws Manassus
bij darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch staigaja eekſch
wiſſeem Zelkeem / eekſch ka wiſſ-
na Tehws bij staigajs/ un kalpo-
ja teem Elka-Deewem / kam
winna Tehws bij kalpojis / un
klannijahs preekſch teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta atstahje wiſſch ta
KUNGU jawo Tehwo Deewu/
un ne staigaja eekſch ta KUNGa
Zelkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Amosa Kalpi darrija
weenu Derribu prett winnu
un nokawe to Kehnizu winna
Namnâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tahs Semmes Lau-
dis kawe tohs wiſſus / kas pret-
to Kehnizu Amonu weenn Derri-
bu bij darrijscht. Un tahs Sem-
mes Laudis darrija winna Deh-
lu Josiju par Kehnizu winna
Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Amos
Leetahm atleek/ fo wiſſch irr dar-
rtjs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
